SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.ai

Class AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation
Enclosing class:
AIMatchService
public static class AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation extends Object
For MO: enrich applicants with match score, missing skills, and workload recommendation.
